series_metadata.series_description: Training Records and learning transcript records for trainings participants who are required to meet yearly training requirements outlined in the OAC, as well as participants earning trainings to acquire credentials (e.g.. adoption assessors, foster parents, domestic violence requirements). Electronic copies of all deliverable products created by vendors to support the Ohio Child Welfare Training Program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office three years. ; Electronic: in office three years
